text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
However, this failure gave me valuable hints for
the next race.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There's no time like the present. We should go
evaluate today's race at once.
choice_data_list: You should rest for today, okay?
We can talk on the way back.
We can talk on the way back.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There's no time like the present. We should go
evaluate today's race at once.
choice_data_list: You should rest for today, okay?
We can talk on the way back.
We can talk on the way back.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: May I ask why? The race is still fresh in my mind...
choice_data_list:
We'll have plenty of time to talk about it
tomorrow.

We'll have plenty of time to talk about it
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Plenty of time, you say? So then, we can discuss
our views until we're both satisfied?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Very well. I'll go home and write down all my
thoughts in preparation for tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, Grass Wonder and I have a
deep and thorough discussion about the ill-fated
race.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes, before this sensation begins to fade...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I can see clearly where my abilities stand. I must
move quickly to amend my shortcomings.
